mainEntity.name: What if a Phoenix firm loses AI Overviews ranking due to algorithm update?
mainEntity.text: What if a Phoenix firm loses AI Overviews ranking due to algorithm update?

acceptedAnswer.text: Phoenix firms recover by auditing E-E-A-T, refreshing local bankruptcy content, boosting reviews, and targeting underserved queries post-update.

suggestedAnswer.text: AI Overviews inherit ranking changes; monitor fluctuations. Phoenix bankruptcy lawyers rebuild with updated Arizona law pages and backlinks. Diversify to ChatGPT/Perplexity to mitigate risks.
